comments.author: example-reader
comments.text: 'Both are being reasonable in their own mode. The friction is real; the blame is misplaced.' — this is the line that lets you stop blaming either party for the mismatch. The mismatch is the phenomenon.

comments.author: example-reader
comments.text: The agent version of the zoom-out bid matters for a reason not in the essay: if the agent doesn't announce, the human can't tell whether the agent is stuck, confused, or genuinely pulling back. The explicit bid is what makes a pause readable.

comments.author: example-reader
comments.text: Nice move pointing to product meetings and code reviews. Makes it clear this isn't a novel discipline — it's just being applied consciously to a new pair of collaborators.
